decision_reason: Within the v16-v20 price-volume line, v18 retains the best overall balance across annual_relative_return(年化超额收益), relative_ir(相对信息比率), and max_drawdown(最大回撤), while later portfolio-layer tweaks produced only marginal gains and did not clear TopK perturbation or cost-stress gates.
next_stage_direction: Open a new single-signal discovery round and stop micro-tuning the v19/v20 portfolio-layer line.
